Book Appointment
Easy to Reach

Clinic Location in Greater Noida

Mind Grace Neuropsychiatric Clinic is in Gamma-2, Greater Noida, with practical access from Alpha-1 Metro, Delta-1 Metro, Pari Chowk, Knowledge Park, nearby schools, and university routes.

Open Directions
Visit Details

Contact Information

Address:

J-123, Gamma-2, Greater Noida,
Uttar Pradesh 201310

Parking:

Parking and drop-off are available nearby.

Transport:

Auto-rickshaw and cab drop-offs are practical from metro and nearby sector routes.

Book a Visit Call Clinic

Metro and Bus Routes

Convenient public transport options to reach the clinic.

Alpha-1 Metro Station

About 4.0 km away • Around 8 minutes by road

Open Route

Delta-1 Metro Station

About 3.9 km away • Around 8 minutes by road

Open Route

Jagat Plaza Bus Stop

About 2.4 km away • Around 6 minutes by road

Open Route

Pari Chowk Bus Terminal

About 4.0 km away • Around 8 minutes by road

Open Route

Universities, Schools, and Work Routes

Easy access from major educational institutions and IT parks.

Sharda University

About 5.3 km away • Around 11 minutes by road

Open Route

IILM University

About 7.3 km away • Around 12 minutes by road

Open Route

DPS Surajpur

About 1.8 km away • Around 5 minutes by road

Open Route

Wipro Knowledge Park IV

About 5.0 km away • Around 10 minutes by road

Open Route
